task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with the placeholder file /home/user/Documents/placeholder.mscz. You do not need to edit the placeholder score; this task is only about MuseScore 3 application preferences.

Enable Auto Save and set the Auto Save interval to exactly 7 minutes, so that `~/.config/MuseScore/MuseScore3.ini` ends up with `autoSave = true` and `autoSaveInterval = 7`.

verification.description: Auto Save is enabled in MuseScore3.ini
Auto Save interval is set to 7 minutes
